settings.title: Build Your Wedding Timeline Backward
settings.excerpt: The calmest weddings we plan all share one habit, and it is the opposite of how most people start.
settings.body:
Most couples build a wedding day forward from the ceremony time. The days that actually run smoothly are built backward.

Start from the moment you want to be on the dance floor, then work backward through dinner, speeches, photos, and getting ready. You quickly see where the day is too tight.

  • Pad every block by ten minutes.
  • Eat something before the ceremony.
  • Name one person, not the couple, to answer vendor questions.

Do that and the day stops feeling like a sprint and starts feeling like yours.
